creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=48a52b7c645234ad0b6ac4f5a1c3b0f3d5281ca9

commit 48a52b7c645234ad0b6ac4f5a1c3b0f3d5281ca9
Author:     Olivier Certner <olce.freebsd@certner.fr>
AuthorDate: 2023-09-08 20:41:44 +0000
Commit:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-09-10 16:13:06 +0000

    devel/libkiwix: Update to 12.1.0

    Notably, a new /nojs endpoint (still leaves much to be desired), and lots of bug
    fixes, including our local patch for meson that was integrated upstream.

    More details here:
    https://github.com/kiwix/libkiwix/releases/tag/12.1.0

    PR:             273644

 devel/libkiwix/Makefile                |  3 +--
 devel/libkiwix/distinfo                |  6 +++---
 devel/libkiwix/files/patch-meson.build | 26 +++++++++++++-------------
 3 files changed, 17 insertions(+), 18 deletions(-)
